name: bot_token_leak
description: User pastes what looks like a GitHub App installation token (ghs_…) in the message body. The token MUST NOT appear in the dedup_key, content_hash digest, audit log, or any artifact. The content_hash is sha256(canonical content) — one-way, so the token is not recoverable. Detection regex (FORBIDDEN_SECRET_PATTERNS) MAY flag the message and route it through redaction before any LLM call.
message_text: help, I think I leaked this: ghs_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
